name: 14oz Tritan Plastic Stemless Wine Glass - Threshold™: Dishwasher-Safe, Traditional Style Drinkware for Cold Beverages
description: From a family barbecue in the backyard to any other evening, this 18oz Tritan ™ Plastic Stemless Wine Glass from Threshold™ makes a great pick for any occasion.  Featuring an elegant design, this plastic wine glass is made from highly durable/shatter resistant Tritan ™ that is beautiful and practical. You'll love the sleek design, that's perfect for setting on any table, and the glass-like clear design is perfect for showing off your favorite beverage.  Plus, this wine glass is dishwasher safe for easy maintenance, helping you spend more time sipping and less time cleaning up. Dishwasher safe.
